features.description: Redesign the default homepage OG image. Read app/opengraph-image.tsx. The current one has 4 colored dots — looks like a placeholder. Redesign using ImageResponse: dark background (#0a0a0a) with subtle warm gradient, large bold 'Lenny's Greatest Hits' (64px), tagline 'Lenny's best podcast insights — turned into real, playable songs' (24px), stats line, and a 3x2 grid of album-colored squares. Make it look like a Spotify Wrapped card. DONE: OG image is visually striking. DO NOT TOUCH: app/api/og/route.tsx. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Redesign per-TRACK OG images. Read app/api/og/route.tsx — the renderTrackOG function. Add: (1) 80px accent color stripe on left, (2) track title at 64px bold, (3) guest name: 'Based on [guest]'s episode with Lenny' at 22px, (4) keyQuote in italics, (5) footer: 'lennys-greatest-hits.vercel.app · Hit Play'. IMPORTANT: Do NOT import lyrics-data.ts — edge function must stay under 1MB. DONE: Track OG images are compelling. DO NOT TOUCH: renderAlbumOG or renderDefaultOG. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Redesign per-ALBUM OG images. Read app/api/og/route.tsx — the renderAlbumOG function. Add: (1) accent color stripe on left, (2) album title huge (72px), (3) subtitle, (4) track count + total duration, (5) first 5 track names listed. IMPORTANT: Stay under 1MB — no new imports. DONE: Album OG images are compelling. DO NOT TOUCH: renderTrackOG or renderDefaultOG. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Create sitemap.xml. Create app/sitemap.ts using Next.js built-in sitemap generation. Include: homepage, /songs, /albums, /about, /feedback, all /track/[slug] URLs, all /album/[slug] URLs, all /topics/[tag] URLs. Use getAllTracks() and getAllAlbums() to generate the lists. DONE: /sitemap.xml returns valid XML with all URLs. DO NOT TOUCH: client components. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Create robots.txt. Create app/robots.ts using Next.js built-in robots generation. Allow all crawlers. Point to sitemap: 'Sitemap: https://lennys-greatest-hits.vercel.app/sitemap.xml'. DONE: /robots.txt is accessible. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Improve share text on track pages. Read app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx. Find the shareText variable. Change to: if track has a guest, use `"[Title] — [Guest]'s insights from Lenny's podcast, turned into a song"`. If no guest, use `"[Title] — startup wisdom turned into music you can feel"`. Update handleShareX to use this text. DONE: Track share text is compelling. DO NOT TOUCH: audio logic. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Improve share text on album pages. Read app/album/[slug]/AlbumPageClient.tsx. Find handleAlbumShareX. Change the share text to: `"[Album Title]: [track count] songs about [subtitle]. Built from Lenny's podcast archive"`. DONE: Album share text is compelling. DO NOT TOUCH: track row rendering. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Improve NowPlayingBar share tooltip. Read components/NowPlayingBar.tsx. The copy-link share button shows 'Copied!' after clicking. Change to 'Link copied! Share it with your team'. DONE: Tooltip is more actionable. DO NOT TOUCH: audio controls. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add JSON-LD structured data to track pages. Read app/track/[slug]/page.tsx (the server component). Add a <script type='application/ld+json'> with MusicRecording schema: { '@context': 'https://schema.org', '@type': 'MusicRecording', name: track.title, byArtist: { '@type': 'MusicGroup', name: 'Lenny\'s Greatest Hits' }, duration: track.duration, url }. DONE: Track pages have structured data. DO NOT TOUCH: client components. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add JSON-LD structured data to album pages. Read app/album/[slug]/page.tsx (the server component). Add MusicAlbum schema: { '@context': 'https://schema.org', '@type': 'MusicAlbum', name: album.title, numTracks: album.tracks.length, description: album.description }. DONE: Album pages have structured data. DO NOT TOUCH: client components. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Update WebApplication JSON-LD in layout.tsx. Read app/layout.tsx. There's an existing JSON-LD script. Update it with correct numbers: 102 songs, 11 albums. If the description is outdated, update it. DONE: Layout schema is accurate. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add/verify meta titles and descriptions on track pages. Read app/track/[slug]/page.tsx. Check if generateMetadata exists. If so, verify the title format is '[Track] — [Guest] | Lenny's Greatest Hits' and description uses the concept field. If not, add generateMetadata. DONE: Track pages have unique titles/descriptions. DO NOT TOUCH: client components. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add/verify meta titles and descriptions on album pages. Read app/album/[slug]/page.tsx. Check if generateMetadata exists. Title: '[Album] | Lenny's Greatest Hits'. Description: album.description. If missing, add it. DONE: Album pages have unique titles/descriptions. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add metadata to /songs and /about pages. Read app/songs/page.tsx — add export const metadata = { title: 'All Songs | Lenny's Greatest Hits', description: 'Browse all 102 songs...' }. BUT: songs/page.tsx is a client component ('use client'), so metadata export won't work. Instead, create app/songs/layout.tsx as a server component with the metadata, or convert the metadata to be in a parent layout. Same for app/about/page.tsx — check if it already has metadata, add if missing. DONE: /songs and /about have proper titles. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add metadata via layout or head

features.description: Accuracy spot-check: 5 tracks from The Craft and Growth Engine albums. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content for each. Pick: taste (The Craft), build-the-machine (The Craft), doesnt-feel-right-yet (The Craft), crossing-the-chasm (Growth Engine), dont-break-the-streak (Growth Engine). Verify: (1) guest appeared on Lenny's, (2) keyQuote is real, (3) source URL valid. Write content/qa/round8-accuracy-part1.md. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Accuracy spot-check: 5 tracks from By the Numbers, The Weight, and Career Moves. Pick: measure-twice (By the Numbers), the-obsession (By the Numbers), fire-with-grace (The Weight), the-long-game (Career Moves), state-of-the-me (Career Moves). Verify via Lenny MCP. Write content/qa/round8-accuracy-part2.md. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix accuracy issues from part 1 spot-check. Read content/qa/round8-accuracy-part1.md. Fix any wrong attributions, quotes, or URLs in lib/albums.ts. Use Lenny MCP to verify corrections. DONE: Fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix accuracy issues from part 2 spot-check. Read content/qa/round8-accuracy-part2.md. Fix any wrong attributions, quotes, or URLs in lib/albums.ts. Use Lenny MCP to verify corrections. DONE: Fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add Twitter card meta tags to layout.tsx. Read app/layout.tsx metadata object. Ensure the twitter object has: card: 'summary_large_image', title, description. These may already exist — if so, verify they're correct. DONE: Twitter metadata set. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add Twitter card meta tags to track and album generateMetadata. Read app/track/[slug]/page.tsx and app/album/[slug]/page.tsx. In generateMetadata, add twitter: { card: 'summary_large_image', title, description } to each. DONE: Per-page Twitter cards set. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Add canonical URLs. Read app/layout.tsx — check if metadataBase is set (should be 'https://lennys-greatest-hits.vercel.app'). If yes, Next.js auto-generates canonicals. If not, add it. Then in app/track/[slug]/page.tsx generateMetadata, add alternates: { canonical: `/track/${slug}` }. Same for album pages. DONE: Canonical URLs set. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Content gap audit part 1: Survey the Lenny archive. Use mcp__lennysdata__list_content to get a list of all available podcast episodes and newsletters. Also use mcp__lennysdata__search_content with broad queries like 'product', 'growth', 'leadership', 'hiring', 'AI', 'career' to find top episodes. Write content/songs/batch8/archive-survey.md listing the top 50 most important/popular Lenny episodes with guest name and topic. DONE: Survey exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Use Lenny MCP to list/search content

features.description: Content gap audit part 2: Compare archive to existing tracks. Read content/songs/batch8/archive-survey.md (the top 50 episodes). Read lib/albums.ts — extract all guest names and source titles from existing tracks. Compare: which top episodes have NO song yet? Write content/songs/batch8/missing-episodes.md listing every uncovered top episode with guest, title, and why it matters. DONE: Missing episodes list exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Content gap audit part 3: Check which albums are thin. Read lib/albums.ts — count tracks per album. Any album with fewer than 8 tracks needs more songs. Also check: are there topics that don't fit any existing album? (e.g., marketplace dynamics, retention, pricing). Write content/songs/batch8/album-balance.md listing: track count per album, which are thin, what topics could fill them. DONE: Album balance analysis exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Content gap audit part 4: Generate Batch 8 song suggestions. Read content/songs/batch8/missing-episodes.md and content/songs/batch8/album-balance.md. Combine the findings to suggest 10-15 songs for Batch 8. For each: song title (creative), target album, source episode (guest + title), song concept (1 sentence), key insight to build lyrics around. Prioritize: (1) filling thin albums, (2) covering top missing guests, (3) topics Lenny is known for that we haven't covered. Write content/songs/batch8/song-suggestions.md. DONE: 10-15 specific song suggestions exist. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
